readme.name: README.md
readme.content: # Xiaomi RearScreen Music > About: A music player compatible with the Xiaomi RearScreen series. *[English](README.md) | [简体中文](README_zh.md)* A highly dynamic, elegantly designed music player widget custom-built for Xiaomi devices equipped with a rear screen. It leverages HyperOS/MIUI widget capabilities to deliver a seamless, native-feeling audio control experience. ### ✨ Features * **Dynamic Lyric Animations**: Lyrics slide up smoothly with a custom transition effect whenever the track progresses, without visual stuttering. * **HyperMaterial & Adaptive Colors**: Automatically extracts color palettes from the current album art to tint the background and UI elements, creating an immersive visual experience. * **Always-On Display (AOD) Support**: Seamlessly transitions between active screen and AOD states, rearranging the layout (like artist and title) to save power while keeping information visible. * **Full Media Controls**: Easily play, pause, skip, or go back to previous tracks with smooth Lottie icon animations. ### 🛠 Contributing Contributions, issues, and feature requests are welcome! Feel free to check the [issues page](../../issues). ### 📄 License This project is licensed under the [GPL-3.0 License](LICENSE). ## Star History ## Sponsor me
